title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Program Brief: Oop Runtime Checks
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop runtime checks increment in a protocol-driven circulation application. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use isinstance, issubclass, runtime-checkable protocols, and explicit capability checks only at justified boundaries.
Define structural Protocol roles that match consumer needs and support static checking without forced inheritance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
